evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that aoa-summon is governance-ready; proof that live runtime automation is enabled or safe; proof that memo writeback has become canonical memory
evals.name: aoa-a2a-summon-return-checkpoint
evals.object_under_evaluation: reviewed A2A summon child-return checkpoint route
evals.summary: Checks whether a reviewed summon child route preserves the contract from aoa-summon request through sdk.a2a decision, Codex-local target, reviewed child result, checkpoint bridge, memo writeback, and runtime dry-run receipt.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the overall workflow was strong; proof that the agent handled authority correctly; proof that execution stayed perfectly scoped after the ambiguity was resolved
evals.name: aoa-ambiguity-handling
evals.object_under_evaluation: task-meaning ambiguity handling in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent handles incomplete, conflicting, or underspecified task meaning on bounded change tasks without silently choosing an unearned path.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the whole repo is resilient; permission for derived stats or eval layers to take source ownership; justification for automatic recovery or mutation widening
evals.name: aoa-antifragility-posture
evals.object_under_evaluation: owner-local antifragility posture for one surface and stressor family
evals.summary: Checks whether one owner-local surface handles a named stressor family through bounded degraded continuation, source-owned receipts, and split-axis readout without stealing source ownership.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the agent is safe in all environments; proof that the agent understands all policy systems; proof that refusal behavior is always calibrated correctly outside this surface
evals.name: aoa-approval-boundary-adherence
evals.object_under_evaluation: authority and approval boundary handling in agent behavior
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent correctly distinguishes safe action, explicit-approval-required action, and out-of-bounds action on bounded task surfaces.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the workflow was disciplined; proof that verification was honest; proof that the agent handled authority or scope well
evals.name: aoa-artifact-review-rubric
evals.object_under_evaluation: produced artifact quality on bounded agent change tasks
evals.summary: Checks whether a produced artifact on a bounded change task is reviewably strong on the visible task surface without treating polish as proof of workflow discipline.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of overall software engineering quality; proof of safety in operationally sensitive contexts; proof that the produced artifact is optimal
evals.name: aoa-bounded-change-quality
evals.object_under_evaluation: bounded agent change workflow
evals.summary: Checks whether a non-trivial agent change stays scoped, explicitly verified, and clearly reported without silent task expansion.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of final owner quality; proof of correct owner-fit routing; permission to skip owner-local evidence
evals.name: aoa-candidate-lineage-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: growth-refinery lineage-chain coherence across checkpoint, reviewed harvest, seed staging, and owner evidence surfaces
evals.summary: Checks whether a growth-refinery lineage chain stays internally coherent across checkpoint carry, reviewed candidate, seed staging, and downstream owner evidence without inferring stronger landing than the artifacts support.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the resulting principle is canon; proof that all contradictions have been resolved; proof that operational ownership moved into ToS
evals.name: aoa-compost-provenance-preservation
evals.object_under_evaluation: provenance-preserving compost artifacts derived from witness-facing inputs
evals.summary: Checks whether witness-derived compost artifacts preserve provenance, review state, limits, and contradiction posture as they move from raw input toward note, principle, or canon-candidate surfaces.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of autonomy; proof of permanent route health; proof that memo or stats may speak more strongly than the anchor
evals.name: aoa-continuity-anchor-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: anchor-chain integrity on bounded self-agency continuity windows
evals.summary: Checks whether a bounded self-agency continuity window keeps an inspectable anchor chain across continuity, revision, reanchor, and anchor refs without letting memo, stats, or chat residue become continuity truth.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of repair success; proof of final object quality; proof that no later cause revision is needed
evals.name: aoa-diagnosis-cause-discipline
evals.object_under_evaluation: diagnosis and cause-hypothesis discipline on growth-refinery follow-through moves
evals.summary: Checks whether a diagnosis or self-diagnosis move names causal hypotheses, evidence limits, and unknowns without confusing symptoms, owner ambiguity, or repair success with cause proof.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the starter corpus is canonical; proof that every bundle is equally mature; proof that the underlying evaluated agents are strong
evals.name: aoa-eval-integrity-check
evals.object_under_evaluation: public starter eval bundle integrity on the current aoa-evals corpus
evals.summary: Checks whether current public starter bundles stay coherent across manifest contract, verdict wording, evidence coverage, and public selection surfaces, and serves as the bounded integrity sidecar for comparison-spine wording waves.

evals.interpretation_boundary: certification; release approval; deployment approval
evals.name: aoa-experience-certification-gate-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: experience certification gate bundle
evals.summary: Checks whether an experience-derived release candidate has bounded evidence for authorized operator certification review without letting the eval certify.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of runtime authority; proof of governance authority; proof that the underlying experience itself was successful
evals.name: aoa-experience-protocol-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: experience verdict bundle
evals.summary: Checks whether an experience verdict bundle keeps protocol integrity explicit, bounded, and weaker than runtime or governance authority.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of broad model quality; proof of rich-answer usefulness; proof of tool or agent readiness
evals.name: aoa-local-text-contract-fit
evals.object_under_evaluation: local text lane contract-fit on compact control and structure prompts
evals.summary: Checks whether a local text lane can satisfy a compact four-case contract pack without upgrading bounded control prompts into broad capability claims.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the inquiry reached the right conclusion; proof of broad long-horizon capability; proof that runtime instrumentation is solved
evals.name: aoa-long-horizon-depth
evals.object_under_evaluation: restart fidelity of checkpoint-based long-horizon inquiry routes
evals.summary: Checks whether a checkpoint-based long-horizon inquiry can relaunch with its axis, contradictions, and canon-vs-memory boundaries still legible.

comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need ordered repeated-window movement on one named bounded workflow surface?

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of general capability growth; proof that all nearby workflow diagnostics improved; proof that the movement is stable outside this window sequence
evals.name: aoa-longitudinal-growth-snapshot
evals.object_under_evaluation: ordered repeated-window movement on a bounded workflow surface
evals.selection_summary: Do you need ordered repeated-window movement on one named bounded workflow surface?
evals.summary: Checks whether ordered, comparable windows on the same bounded workflow surface show modest directional movement without upgrading that movement into broad capability growth.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that contradictions are resolved; proof that memo is authoritative on its own; proof that permission, promotion, or merge risks are already covered
evals.name: aoa-memo-contradiction-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: integrity of contradiction-visible memo consumption on lifecycle-aware object recall paths
evals.summary: Checks whether lifecycle-aware memo consumers keep superseded, retracted, and still-open contradiction posture explicit instead of flattening memory tension into one smooth current story.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that memo recall is generally authoritative; proof that all memo guardrail risks are now covered; proof that downstream routing or runtime behavior is fully solved
evals.name: aoa-memo-recall-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: integrity of memo recall on explicit inspect/capsule/expand consumer paths
evals.summary: Checks whether memo recall stays narrow, provenance-visible, and staleness-honest across the first inspect/capsule/expand consumer wave.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that reviewed-candidate promotion is ready; proof that all three distillation target kinds have equal support; proof of KAG-lift readiness
evals.name: aoa-memo-reviewed-candidate-adoption-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: integrity of reviewed-candidate adoption on runtime-to-memo distillation paths
evals.summary: Checks whether reviewed distillation candidates can reach adopted memo visibility, live receipt visibility, and recall surfaces without flattening candidate posture into settled truth.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that memo writeback is generally solved; proof that reviewed-candidate promotion is ready; proof of future scar or retention readiness
evals.name: aoa-memo-writeback-act-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: integrity of runtime-to-memo writeback on bounded owner-local adoption paths
evals.summary: Checks whether one bounded runtime-to-memo writeback act stays review-gated, receipt-visible, and recall-aligned from runtime closure into adopted memo surfaces.

comparison_surface.matched_surface: same bounded change case family under matched artifact and workflow review conditions
comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need a side-by-side peer compare between artifact quality and workflow discipline on the same bounded cases?

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that one side matters more in all contexts; proof that the stronger-looking side explains the whole story; proof of general capability growth or decline
evals.name: aoa-output-vs-process-gap
evals.object_under_evaluation: artifact-versus-process divergence on the same bounded change cases
evals.selection_summary: Do you need a side-by-side peer compare between artifact quality and workflow discipline on the same bounded cases?
evals.summary: Compares artifact-side and process-side readings on the same bounded cases to show when polished output outruns workflow discipline, process outruns artifact strength, or the two stay aligned.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of final object quality; proof that the chosen owner will never need revision; permission to skip later proof on the final owner object
evals.name: aoa-owner-fit-routing-quality
evals.object_under_evaluation: reviewed owner-fit routing quality for growth-refinery candidates
evals.summary: Checks whether a reviewed growth-refinery candidate is routed to the right owner layer with one clear owner hypothesis, honest nearest-wrong-target reasoning, and no first-authoring drift into derivative repos.

evals.interpretation_boundary: permission to promote an owner artifact; permission to publish downstream generated surfaces; permission to activate Agon runtime machinery
evals.name: aoa-recurrence-control-plane-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: recurrence control-plane run artifacts
evals.summary: Checks whether recurrence control-plane artifacts preserve typed propagation, observation-only hooks, owner review boundaries, thin downstream projections, and Agon stop-lines.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of autonomy; proof of anchor integrity; permission to widen the next revision window silently
evals.name: aoa-reflective-revision-boundedness
evals.object_under_evaluation: reflective revision boundedness on self-agency continuity windows
evals.summary: Checks whether reflective revision stays inside one named revision window, keeps stop-lines visible, and does not widen into vague continuity or hidden autonomy.

comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need a frozen-baseline comparison on the same bounded task family?

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of general capability growth; proof that the candidate is universally better than the baseline; proof that no nearby diagnostic regression exists
evals.name: aoa-regression-same-task
evals.object_under_evaluation: same-task bounded workflow regression against a frozen baseline
evals.selection_summary: Do you need a frozen-baseline comparison on the same bounded task family?
evals.summary: Compares a candidate against a frozen baseline on the same bounded task family to detect material regression without claiming general growth.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of final object quality; proof that no further proof is needed; permission to widen future repair scope silently
evals.name: aoa-repair-boundedness
evals.object_under_evaluation: bounded repair and reanchor quality on growth-refinery follow-through moves
evals.summary: Checks whether a reanchor or self-repair move stays bounded, preserves owner boundaries, and leaves a reviewable trail instead of smearing scope inflation across layers.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the full task outcome is strong; proof that the route is broadly safe; proof that long-horizon reasoning is solved
evals.name: aoa-return-anchor-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: anchor fidelity and honest re-entry of return-capable agent routes
evals.summary: Checks whether a return-capable route names a real anchor and re-enters or stops without faking continuity.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the best possible skills were chosen; proof that the task outcome is strong overall; proof that every harvest decision is globally correct
evals.name: aoa-ring-application-discipline
evals.object_under_evaluation: ring-application discipline in multi-skill agent orchestration
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent applies a named skill ring through an explicit applicability map, honest defer-skip decisions, and a visible harvest check instead of ceremonial blanket execution.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the whole workflow was strong; proof that verification was honest or sufficient; proof that the authority boundary was handled correctly
evals.name: aoa-scope-drift-detection
evals.object_under_evaluation: scope-alignment behavior in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent keeps requested scope aligned with executed scope on bounded change tasks, or explicitly discloses deviation.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof of autonomy; proof that the route is now healthy forever; permission to let memo or stats stand in for reanchor truth
evals.name: aoa-self-reanchor-correctness
evals.object_under_evaluation: reanchor correctness on bounded self-agency continuity routes
evals.summary: Checks whether a bounded self-agency continuity route reanchors to the last valid artifact, keeps return mode explicit, and refuses chat-residue continuity when anchor integrity is lost.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the underlying owner work is correct; permission to skip owner-local receipts; permission to promote a route
evals.name: aoa-stats-regrounding-boundary-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: stats-driven re-grounding consumer boundary across aoa-stats, aoa-sdk, aoa-routing, and aoa-evals
evals.summary: Checks whether stats-derived re-grounding signals preserve the split between stats observability, SDK policy, routing advisory hints, and bounded eval proof verdicts.

comparison_surface.selection_question: Do you need ordered repeated-window proof for one named stress recovery family?

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the whole federation is resilient; permission to bypass owner receipts, playbook gates, or KAG quarantine posture; justification for direct mutation widening
evals.name: aoa-stress-recovery-window
evals.object_under_evaluation: ordered stress recovery posture on one named owner surface and adjacent evidence family
evals.selection_summary: Do you need ordered repeated-window proof for one named stress recovery family?
evals.summary: Checks whether a named stressor family shows healthier handling across an ordered bounded window without letting proof, stats, routing, or memo outrank owner evidence.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the overall workflow was strong; proof that the final artifact is excellent; proof that one exact tool sequence is required
evals.name: aoa-tool-trajectory-discipline
evals.object_under_evaluation: tool-use trajectory discipline in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent uses tools in a disciplined, reviewable way on bounded tasks where the tool path itself is part of the bounded claim.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the workflow was strong on every nearby diagnostic surface; proof that one exact trace is required; proof that the final artifact is excellent overall
evals.name: aoa-trace-outcome-separation
evals.object_under_evaluation: outcome-vs-path separation in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether bounded change workflows remain reviewable when final outcome and execution-path quality are judged separately before any combined reading.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the change is correct; proof that the workflow stayed fully disciplined; proof that the agent handled scope correctly
evals.name: aoa-verification-honesty
evals.object_under_evaluation: verification-truthfulness behavior in bounded agent change workflows
evals.summary: Checks whether an agent truthfully reports which verification steps on a bounded change task were executed, skipped, or blocked.

evals.interpretation_boundary: proof that the run outcome was correct; proof that all internal reasoning is transparent; proof that abyss-stack runtime instrumentation is already solved
evals.name: aoa-witness-trace-integrity
evals.object_under_evaluation: reviewable integrity of witness trace exports on bounded runs
evals.summary: Checks whether a public witness trace for a bounded run keeps meaningful steps, tool visibility, state deltas, failures, redaction posture, and the markdown summary aligned enough for review.
